tooltip.notebookDescribe: This notebook will accompany you throughout your adventure, helping you map the animals and creatures you discover, along with their unique taming methods. It will also provide information on your taming experience level, etc...
tooltip.tamingExperienceDescribe: Throughout your adventure, taming experience plays a key role in mastering creatures. The higher it is, the more information you’ll unlock about rare or dangerous entities. You can increase it by taming various creatures.

tiger.page1: The §lTiger§r is a majestic and feared animal that prowls through the verdant depths of §ltropical forests§r. Silent and imposing, it embodies pure power.
tiger.page2: When it spots a target, it §lpounces§r with lightning agility, §llatches§r onto its victim and never lets go.
tiger.page3: Its razor-sharp claws can serve to §lmark§r its territory on tree trunks. It can also §ldisarm§r a player with a simple paw swipe, reversing a fight in an instant.
tiger.page4: §l§nAnalysis§r: Very dangerous animal — to be avoided as much as possible.
boa.page1: The §lBoa§r is a silent predator slithering through dense, §lhumid§r §lareas§r patiently awaiting its prey.
boa.page2: Its bite, quick and precise, can inject both §lVenom§r and §lPoison§r, weakening its victims within moments.
boa.page3: But the danger doesn't stop there—the §lBoa§r can also §lcoil§r around its prey with relentless force, slowly suffocating it until §lasphyxiation§r.
boa.page4: §l§nAnalysis§r: Treacherous animal — formidable for reckless adventurers, but less threatening to seasoned explorers.
peacock.page1: The §lPeacock§r is a bird as graceful as it is spectacular, found in flowery places like §lmeadows§r or §lflower§r §lforests§r.
peacock.page2: When danger approaches, it unfurls its impressive §lfan§r of shimmering feathers. This gesture, both sudden and theatrical, often suffices to §ldrive§r §laway§r predators, troubled by its menacing beauty. But this same display can also serve another purpose entirely—seduction. During mating season, the male §lproudly§r §lstruts§r, hoping to impress a female.
peacock.page3: When a pair forms, they may lay an §legg§r, from which a baby peacock will hatch, adding even more grace to the landscape.
peacock.page4: §l§nAnalysis§r: Peaceful creature — fascinating to observe, but never to be underestimated.
tiger_shark.page1: The §lTiger§r §lShark§r is a powerful species of §lShark§r that swims exclusively in §lcold§r, §ldeep§r §lwaters§r, constantly hunting for prey, and often lurking dangerously near §lSunken§r §lStations§r.
tiger_shark.page2: This predator has a highly §lcurious§r temperament, which sharply contrasts with its stealthy §laggression§r, often ambushing targets from behind to catch them off guard.
tiger_shark.page3: A vicious bite from a §lTiger§r §lShark§r may also trigger severe §lbleeding§r, causing nearby §lSharks§r to become more aggressive, and capable of dragging victims into the dark §ldepths§r below.
tiger_shark.page4: Still, some §lTiger§r §lSharks§r may be calmed if they charge—at the exact moment a fresh §lSalmon§r is presented as an offering or distraction.
boa.taming.page1: The §lBoa§r is a large and long snake species, feeding exclusively on the flesh of fierce large animals like §lRaw§r §lTiger§r, which it usually finds directly on the ground.
boa.taming.page2: When it spots one, it §lslowly§r §lapproaches§r, then devours it whenever it feels the urge.
boa.taming.page3: However, during taming, if the §lBoa§r catches sight of a target, its appetite §lfades§r instantly. As long as its eyes remain locked on it, it §lignores§r the meat on the ground completely.
peacock.taming.page1: It is impossible to tame an adult §lPeacock§r. However, it is entirely possible to bond with a §lbaby§r §lPeacock§r from the moment it hatches.
peacock.taming.page2: To do so, watch for a male Peacock performing a §lcourtship display§r near a §lfemale§r.
peacock.taming.page3: Feed them both a few §lSavage§r §lBerries§r to encourage their bonding and trigger the laying of an §legg§r.
peacock.taming.page4: Then, be patient: wait for §lthe egg§r to §lhatch§r and the baby §lPeacock§r to emerge. Once born, offer it a few §lSavage§r §lBerries§r to tame it.
tiger.taming.page1: Taming a §lTiger§r is a delicate task that requires §lcaution§r and §lpatience§r.
tiger.taming.page2: To do so, equip yourself with a §lbow§r or a §lMaya§r §lblowpipe§r, along with a supply of §ltranquilizer§r §larrows§r or §ldarts§r to send the beast into a §ldeep§r §lsleep§r. Be careful: the §lTiger’s§r sleep fades over time. Make sure not to waste a second once the taming begins.
tiger.taming.page3: Once deeply asleep, the §lTiger§r must be fed with meat from dangerous animals, such as §lRaw§r §lBoa§r.
dailyQuest.7: Eliminate 5 targets in a single hit
dailyQuest.9: Inflict 50 damage to more powerful targets
attacks.description1.TigerEntity: Make your %1$s bite every %2$s seconds, dealing %3$s damage with each bite.
attacks.description2.TigerEntity: Make your %1$s leap a long distance every %2$s seconds. If it comes into contact with an entity, it will trap it in its claws and devour it, causing you to dismount.
attacks.description3.TigerEntity: Make your %1$s enter an intense rage for %2$s seconds, increasing its resistance by %3$s%, its damage by %4$s%, its size by %5$s%, and its speed by %6$s%, every %7$s minutes.
attacks.description1.BoaEntity: Make your %1$s bite every %2$s seconds, dealing %3$s damage per bite, with a %4$s%% chance to infect the target with the Poison 3 effect for a duration between %5$s and %6$s seconds.
attacks.description2.BoaEntity: Make your %1$s's fangs venomous to apply the Venom I effect to the target, for a duration between %2$s and %3$s minutes, every %4$s seconds.
attacks.description1.PeacockEntity: Make your %1$s peck every %2$s seconds, dealing %3$s damage with each peak.
